dc_description: A first-person view from inside a tent shows a person lying down with their legs extended on a sleeping pad. The person is wearing light-colored socks with small dark logos and tan or pinkish pants. The tent interior has pale fabric walls with dark trim and a dark blue floor. A small bag or pouch is partially visible in the lower-left corner.
novel_visual_observations: The sleeping pad has a light gray patterned surface and occupies the lower center of the frame.
The tent doorway or wall seam is outlined by a thick black border, with zipper hardware visible along the right edge.
location_name: Via Dante Alighieri, Le Coste, Montefiascone
rich_context: Poste Italiane, 19, Via Dante Alighieri, Le Mosse, Le Coste, Montefiascone, Viterbo, Lazio, 01027, Italia
